title: Metaverse City Hall

description.paragraph1: The city hall launched a holographic portal for issuing documents.
description.paragraph2: The problem is that the elderly use a physical terminal, young people use a neural app, and employees use an old computer with Ubuntu 24.04.
description.paragraph3: Each update breaks half of the screens, but curiously, the tax system continues to work perfectly.

bullet_point.bullet1: It would not be cool to issue government documents incorrectly. The system [b]cannot fail[/b].
bullet_point.bullet2: Interface changes happen constantly. The system must work on all of them.
bullet_point.bullet3: The document issuance logic must remain separate.
bullet_point.bullet4: Everyone using the system needs to understand how the interface works. [b]Learnability[/b] is essential.

footnote: [i]~ The tax is the only thing that never breaks. Coincidence? I think not.[/i]

bug1.description: The team forgot why they chose the MVC pattern. What is the main advantage of separating Model, View, and Controller?

choices.wrong2: Eliminates the need for a database
